name: Roncador (SS-301)
events: This page was last updated in April 2017.
6 Apr 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) departed Philadelphia, Pennsylvania for New London, Connecticut.
7 Apr 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) arrived at New London, Connecticut.
18 Apr 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) arrived at Newport Rhode Island from New London, Connecticut for torpedo trials.
21 Apr 1945 Having completed her torpedo trials, USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN), returned to New London, Connecticut.

22 May 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) departed New London for Port Everglades, Florida. She made the passage together with USS USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) which was to proceed to Key West, Florida. They were escorted by USS Scoter.
26 May 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) arrived at Port Everglades, Florida.
22 Jun 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) departed Port Everglades, Florida for Key West, Florida.
23 Jun 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) arrived at Key West, Florida from Port Everglades, Florida.
25 Jun 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
26 Jun 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
27 Jun 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
29 Jun 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
30 Jun 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
2 Jul 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
3 Jul 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
4 Jul 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
7 Jul 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) departed Key West, Florida for Port Everglades, Florida.
8 Jul 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) arrived at Port Everglades, Florida from Key West, Florida.
29 Jul 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) departed Port Everglades, Florida for the Panama Canal Zone.
3 Aug 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) arrived in the Panama Canal Zone from Port Everglades, Florida.
24 Aug 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) departed the Panama Canal Zone for Guantanamo Bay, Cuba. With the war over she was ordered to remain in the Atlantic.
26 Aug 1945 USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) arrived at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba from the Panama Canal Zone. In mid-September USS Roncador shifted to the Pacific.
